message:
fix: qualify structural-only marker references in verifier SDK tests and refresh telemetry artifacts

sdk/verifier_sdk.rs:
- Fix test_structural_only_markers_are_stable to use super:: qualified
  paths for STRUCTURAL_ONLY_SECURITY_POSTURE and STRUCTURAL_ONLY_RULE_ID,
  matching the module-level constant locations
- Apply rustfmt line wrapping to assert_eq! calls

Artifact refresh:
- bd-1now.4.6: update clippy_output, unit_test_output, e2e_log, and
  stage_results with latest telemetry bridge test run results
- bd-1now.4.7: update perf_log and perf_raw_output with latest
  performance measurement pass

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
